series_description: Records personnel within an administrative structure.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until obsolete ; Electronic: Retain until obsolete

series_description: Record of money received for cosmo licenses issued (personal & salon licenses), by receipt number, ID number, name, type of license, kind of license, and total amount received. Shows total amount deposited and date of deposit.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by the St. Auditor, and after report is released ; Electronic: Retain until audited by the St. Auditor, and after report is released

series_description: Forms used to order supplies and printing orders.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year after audit by St. Auditor and audit report is released ; Electronic: Retain one year after audit by St. Auditor and audit report is released

series_description: Fiscal reports, monthly reports, pay-ins deposited with Treasurer's Office, monthly reports - all documentation pertains to the receipt of funds.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released ; Electronic: Retain one year after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released

series_description: A complete inventory of equipment with a cost of $1000 or more, as mandated by the St. Auditor.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superceded ; Electronic: Continually maintained and updated on state system

series_description: Contains authorized representative form(paper or electronic)and all data entered upon the state''s electronic licensing system related to the authorized representative.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until data is entered into state''''''''s electronic licensing system ; Electronic: Retain until data is entered into state''s electronic licensing system. Once authorized representative is no longer active or the representative of the salon, facility or school represented, the electronic licensing system record may be erased.

series_description: Gives hourly breakdown on student who transfer or discontinues education. Record retained in the event that student wishes to transfer hours to another school.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned. ; Electronic: Retain five years after the date record was created.

series_description: Titles for state-owned automobiles.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until automobile is no longer in possession

series_description: Lists all examinees by: List of examinees scheduled for a particular exam by date and used to verify attendance.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned. ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years.

series_description: Terms of Agreements, leases, and maintenance on various types of equipment owned by the board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned or for period of time specified in lease - maintain until next agreement has been issued ; Electronic: Retain for period of time specified in lease or until next agreement has been issued, and auditor has released final audit report.

series_description: : Series contains Notice of Opportunity for Hearing, Consent Agreements, Board Orders, Correspondence, Case Exhibits (e.g. inspection reports, pictures, witness statements, and evidentiary documents), 119 Hearing transcripts relating to violations, Hearing Officer Reports & Recommendations, and appellate documents relating to individual cases.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to machine readable format. ; Electronic: Retain for 10 years after administrative procedure under Chapter 119 of the Ohio Revised Code is complete, including the exhaustion of all appeals.

series_description: Includes correspondence sent or received by board staff, including paper or electronic mail, requesting or conveying general information pertaining to the Board or government interests. This correspondence is informative, but does not attempt to influence agency policy.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six months of receipt or sent date, or until scanned, whichever occurs first. ; Electronic: Retain for six months of receipt or sent date.

series_description: Record contains listing of school name, license number, and school addresses of schools ordered by license number.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned. ; Electronic: Retain for five years

series_description: Contains sent or received correspondence of the head of an agency, or designee, including paper, electronic mail, electronic messaging, or social messaging dealing with significant aspects of the administration of their offices. Correspondence includes information concerning agency policies, procedures, program, fiscal, and personnel matters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years ; Electronic: Retain two years

series_description: Includes records created, sent, or received by the Board, which convey information of temporary importance, including, but not limited to: electronic mail, electronic messages, phone messages, phone logs, post-it notes, calendars, facsimile cover sheets, notes to convey information, notes for follow-up, drafts of documents upon which no official agency action is taken, routine correspondence, routine e-mail, and routine voice mail. [Note: routine correspondence, e-mail and voice mail pertain to communication of generic information; if to the public, frequently by standard form letters or publications.]
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until information has no further value ; Electronic: Retain until information has no further value

series_description: Record series contains all policy statements and written procedures approved by the Board, or approved by the Executive Director pertaining to functions, activities, systems, personnel, directives of the Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper: retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced,

series_description: Series contains consumer complaints regarding a business, school or individual. Series also contains records transferred on 01/21/2018 previously under series authorization number 50040003, agency series 877007. As of 01/21/2018 the State Cosmetology and Barber Board processes and retains all records from the Ohio State Barber Board per the enactment of H.B. 49.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 years after investigation is complete or until scanned to machine-readable format, whichever occurs first, unless matter goes to hearing. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years after investigation is complete and case is closed, including all appeals.

series_description: Contains application and supportive documents for all licenses issued by the Ohio State Cosmetology and Barber Board collected though the online licensing service.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain as long as license is active, until notification of closure, or for four (4) years after the license has been classified by the Board as “Inactive” or “Expired.” ; Paper: Retain until scanned

series_description: Records include data entered into agency based system to record and create inspection reports on schools, individuals, salons, and barbershops inspected by state inspectors such as: inspection finding, violations/warnings given, salon/barbershop name, ID number, and signature of salon/barbershop owner or manager or data converted from Salesforce system into a searchable archive format upon replacement of Salesforce system. Record series includes paper copies created and data created and maintained as part of the salon/barbershop inspection record. Record series includes all records retained as of 1/21/2018 form Series 50040002, agency series BRB-877004. As of 01/21/2018 the State Cosmetology and Barber Board processes and retains all records from the Ohio State Barber Board per the enactment of H.B. 49.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper versions of inspection report will be maintained until scanned as part of administrative case file and hold no further administrative value. ; Electronic: Salesforce system data shall be retained for five years after creation date of the inspection record or until the salesforce system is discontinued and data is converted to a searchable archive format. Archive data shall be maintained for five years after the creation date of the inspection record. Emailed copies of inspection reports are held until replaced by signed paper copy and

series_description: Audio recordings of Board/Committee meetings used to prepare meeting notes and minutes.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until meeting minutes or notes are approved by the Board and/or Executive Director.

series_description: File contains documentation of personal license issued by the State Cosmetology and Barber Board, including: examination application, examination results, work permit application, new license application, renewal information, correspondence to and from licensee/applicant and/or address change or additional license applications, education records and information, and/or reschedule applications. Series also includes inactive/lapsed barber license files containing proof of licensure of inactive/lapsed barbers, documentation of violations and discipline issued, and reinstatement actions taken. Series also contains records transferred on 01/21/2018 previously under series authorization number 50040007, agency series BRB-877002. As of 01/21/2018 the State Cosmetology and Barber Board processes and retains all records from the Ohio State Barber Board per the enactment of H.B. 49.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned or for 20 years after the expiration date of the license, or upon notification of death whichever occurs first. ; Electronic: Maintain for 20 years after the expiration date of the license, or upon notification of death, whichever occurs first.

series_description: Documents agency activities required under ORC 4713 and ORC Section 4713.071.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until filed with required agencies under ORC 4713.071 and scanned. ; Electronic: Retain until posted on agency website and until biennial audit is complete

series_description: Monthly breakdown of student’s hours from private, vocational, and institutional schools to the Board. Series also includes monthly reports of attendance and hours for private and institutional barber schools transferred on 01/21/2018 from series authorization #50040005, agency series 877008. As of 01/21/2018 the State Cosmetology and Barber Board processes and retains all records from the Ohio State Barber Board per the enactment of H.B. 49.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned. ; Electronic: Retain for five years from receipt. ; Electronic: Permanently retain.
disposition: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Electronic: Permanent

series_description: Documents pertaining to Board Committee Meetings and related exhibits, including the agenda; and exhibits [if noted in the minutes that the exhibit will be included in the Journal].
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for two years ; Paper: Retain until scanned

series_description: The Board Meeting minutes, as well as documents pertaining to Board Meetings and related exhibits, including the agenda, administrative hearing report and recommendations, the Administrative Action Report, and other information provided to the Board.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for two years ; Paper: Retain until electronic version of documents are created and stored.

series_title: Board Meeting and Committee Meeting Sign-In Sheets
series_description: Member and public sign-in sheets for Board and Board Committee Meetings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned. ; Electronic: Retain for two years

series_description: Confidentiality forms executed by school officials and instructors who participate in the review and testing of Board licensure examinations.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: Record used to demonstrate an individual has completed a board-approved training course.
retention_statement: Electronic: 4 years after the expiration of the course. ; Paper: Maintain until scanned.

series_description: File contains documentation of boutique service registration issued by the State Cosmetology and Barber Board
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain for 2 years after the expiration date of the registration, or upon notification of death, whichever occurs first. ; Paper: Retain until scanned

series_description: Applies to receipts for state vehicle fuel purchases
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned ; Electronic: Reconcile with Voyager Report

series_description: Checks and correspondence pertaining to checks from applicants for licensure/registration which has been returned by the Treasurer's Office or a financial institution.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned ; Electronic: Retain until acceptable payment is received or the Board determines a case uncollectible

series_title: Test Materials, Examinations, and Evaluation Tools
series_description: Test materials, examinations, and evaluation tools used in an examination for licensure that the Board develops or contracts with a private or government entity to administer as defined by R.C. 4713.24, unless the release of the record is otherwise prohibited by state or federal law, or the record is deemed to be the proprietary information of a private entity.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned ; Electronic: Retain for twenty (20) years
